title: Hilton (HLT) Q3 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Rise Y/Y
text: Hilton's (HLT) third-quarter performance benefits from a rise in leisure demand and improvements in transient and group businesses.

title: Hilton Hotels raises profit forecasts after strong third-quarter earnings
text: Following a solid third-quarter earnings report that surpassed prior estimates, Hilton World Holdings raised its profit forecast for the end of 2022.

title: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (HLT) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE:HLT ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 26, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Jill Slattery - Senior Vice President, Investor Relations & Corporate Development Chris Nassetta - President & Chief Executive Officer Kevin Jacobs - Chief Financial Officer & President, Global Development Conference Call Participants Joe Greff - JPMorgan Shaun Kelley - Bank of America Carlo Santarelli - Deutsche Bank Smedes Rose - Citi David Katz - Jefferies Robin Farley - UBS Chad Beynon - Macquarie Patrick Scholes - Truist Securities Duane Pfennigwerth - Evercore ISI Stephen Grambling - Morgan Stanley Brandt Montour - Barclays Operator Good morning and welcome to the Hilton Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. All participants will be in a listen-only mode.

title: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (HLT) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (HLT) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 4.80% and 0.04%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Hilton profit tops estimates as revenue falls slightly short in Q3
text: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. HLT, +0.01% said Wednesday it had net income of $347 million, or $1.26 a share, in the third quarter, up from $241 million, or 86 cents a share, in the year-earlier period. Adjusted for one-time items, earnings came to $1.31 a share, ahead of the $1.25 FactSet consensus.

title: Hilton Reports Third Quarter Results; Exceeds Expectations
Which of These Beaten-Down Travel Stocks Is the Better Buy?
text: Amid a consumer spending shift from goods to experiences, the hospitality market is poised to recover quickly.

title: Peloton to Put Its Bikes in All Hilton-Branded Hotels in the US
text: Company says nearly all 5,400 hotels in its US portfolio will have at least one of the exercise bikes by the end of the year.

title: Peloton partners with Hilton: ‘stop fooling around with Peloton'
text: Peloton Interactive Inc (NASDAQ: PTON) is up 5.0% on Monday after the exercise equipment manufacturer announced a partnership with Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc (NYSE: HLT).

title: Peloton Targets Exercise-Hungry Travelers With Hilton Partnership
text: Peloton has launched a collaboration with hotel chain Hilton, marking the connected fitness firm's third partnership in two weeks as it tries to reach new audiences. The deal makes Hilton the first hospitality brand to feature Peloton's bikes throughout its entire United States portfolio, according to a Monday (Oct. 3) news release.

title: Peloton stock gains after company reaches deal to put bikes in Hilton hotels
text: Peloton Interactive Inc. PTON, -1.70% said Monday that it had reached an agreement with Hilton Hotels Corp. HLT, -1.02% to put Peloton bikes in the hotel chain's entire U.S. portfolio of locations. Through the arrangement, Peloton expects that nearly all of its 5,400 Hilton-branded hotels in the U.S. will have at least one Peloton bike.

title: Peloton will put bikes in every Hilton-owned hotel in the U.S.
text: Peloton will put bikes in all 5,400 Hilton-owned hotels in the U.S., the company announced Monday.

title: Hilton and Peloton Team Up to Enhance the Travel Wellness Experience
text: MCLEAN, Va. & NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Hilton (NYSE: HLT) and Peloton Interactive, Inc. (Nasdaq: PTON) announced an industry-first partnership, making Hilton the first hospitality brand to feature Peloton Bikes across its entire U.S. hotel portfolio of 18 award-winning brands.
